Dependency=ASHRAE IECC Climate Zone 2004: # Description: Hot water fixture usage and flow levels.
# Source: Field data from a demand management program with 1700 residential electric resistance water heaters in the Northeast U.S., mean-shifted from 0.8 to 1 average usage.
# Assumption: For ['1A - HI'], a lognormal distribution was fitted to the fied data and the mean was then shifted by 25%.
# Assumption: The distribution has an average value of 1.250 when transformed and a standard deviation of 0.239.
# Assumption: Low, Medium, and High usage is assigned based on the lower 25th percent, middle 50th percent, and upper 25th percent.
